subcodes.first_line: How wondrous is the mention of him who maketh mention of Me, and how sweet the praise of him who praiseth his Lord, the Mighty, the All-Bountiful! Verily, praise from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ما ابدع ذکری من یذکرنی و ما احلی ثنائی من یثنی ربه العزیز الکریم ان الثناء من
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @thankfulness; gratitude
